def validate_batch(items):
    errors = []
    for item in items:
        if not item.get("name"):
            errors.append(f"Missing name for item {item.get('id')}")
        if item.get("quantity", 0) < 0:
            errors.append(f"Negative quantity for item {item['id']}")
        if item.get("price", 0) < 0:
            errors.append(f"Negative price for item {item['id']}")
    if errors:
        raise ValueError("; ".join(errors))
    return items

def process_orders(orders):
    all_errors = []
    for order in orders:
        try:
            validate_single_order(order)
        except Exception as e:
            all_errors.append(str(e))
    return all_errors
